original_text:
### Image Treatment
- Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."
- Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
- Waves and gradients may overlay photography.
- Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

relations.note: Both define the complete Image Treatment device: style + crop shape.
Overlay guidance applies within the same Accent-shape image treatment context.

quotes: warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Conveys returning to everyday life and "getting back to themselves."

rules.intent: Keep patient imagery emotionally authentic and on-brand with the 'getting back to themselves' narrative.
rules.rule_text: Patient photography uses warm, realistic lifestyle imagery (image_treatment.photography.warm_lifestyle = 'warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery') depicting simple everyday moments (walking the dog, beach, BBQ) that convey returning to everyday life.

quotes: Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

rules.intent: Preserve the brand's signature asymmetric image framing and prevent generic rectangular/circular crops.
rules.rule_text: All photography must be housed in the Accent shape crop — asymmetric rounded-corner framing — never in plain rectangles or circles.

quotes: Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

rules.intent: Allow decorative wave/gradient layering over imagery without mandating it.
rules.rule_text: Waves and gradient devices may overlay photography as an optional layering treatment.

quotes: Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).
Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.intent: Ensure images are accessible to screen-reader users across all content.
rules.rule_text: Every image must include descriptive alt text, per brand accessibility rules.
